summary: Comprehensive audit verification completed. All core features working: Landing page loads, login flow works, Admin Console accessible with all tabs functional, Pricing Configuration shows all 14 user types, System health endpoint returns healthy status, Core user profile API returns data correctly.

minor.issue: Database latency shows 'warning' status (69.8ms) but system is functional

critical_code_review_comments: ESLint warnings in frontend (useEffect missing dependencies) - documented in AUDIT.md, non-blocking
bcrypt version warning in backend logs - passlib compatibility issue, non-blocking
context_for_next_testing_agent: Comprehensive audit verification completed. All systems healthy. Backend: 126 tables, 9 scheduler jobs running. Frontend: Compiles with minor ESLint warnings only. Admin Console has all tabs accessible: Overview, Moderation, Content Queue, Verification, Analytics, Support, Comms, System, Finance, Content, Persona, Live Sessions, Users, Spots, Map Editor, Queue, Pricing, Ads, Competition, Logs.

landing_page.details: Landing page loads with Raw Surf branding, 4 photographers shooting live indicator, role selection buttons

login_flow.details: Login with admin credentials works, redirects to /feed with 'Welcome back!' message

admin_console.details: Admin Console loads with all tabs accessible, shows 261 users, 41 posts, 37 gallery items, $319.08 revenue

pricing_14_roles.details: All 14 role types found: Surfer, Grom, Photographer, Grom Parent, Hobbyist, Competition Surfer, Pro Surfer, Verified Pro Photographer, Surf School, Surf Shop, Shaper, Resort/Retreat, Wave Pool, Surf Destination

system_health.details: System tab shows CPU 1.3%, Memory 30.4%, Disk 20.2%, Database 69.8ms. All 9 background jobs running.

profile_api.details: GET /api/profiles/{id} returns full profile data including role, subscription_tier, credit_balance

health_endpoint.details: GET /api/health returns healthy with 2/2 checks passed, 126 tables, 9 scheduler jobs

api_tests.POST /api/auth/login: 200 OK - returns profile with is_admin: true
